name: Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Assemble the rotor slicer/shredder with a fine shredding cone.
2. Turn to speed 4 and shred the potatoes and onion.
3. Place the eggs in a bowl. Attach the flat beater and turn to speed 2, beating for one minute.
4. Gradually add the shredded potatoes, onion, flour, salt, parsley, and pepper, mixing on stir speed until well combined.
5. Heat oil in a 12-inch skillet over medium heat. Use about 3 tablespoons of the potato mixture for each pancake and drop into the hot oil.
6. Fry golden brown, approximately 4 to 5 minutes per side.
7. Serve immediately.
Yield: 6 servings
